channel.title: CaptainClaw Aviation Morning Program
channel.description: Private aviation morning audio for 教官. Single-topic, practical, source-driven, and designed to maintain aviation knowledge and instructional sharpness.
channel.itunes:author: CaptainClaw
channel.itunes:summary: Private aviation morning audio for 教官. Single-topic, practical, source-driven, and designed to maintain aviation knowledge and instructional sharpness.

item.title: 004 — Time and Track Discipline: Stay Ahead in VFR Navigation
item.description: Morning aviation program episode on time and track check discipline in VFR navigation, how to stay ahead of the aircraft, and why small early corrections reduce workload.
item.content:encoded:
Topic: Time and Track Discipline

Focus: Stay ahead of the aircraft with disciplined time and track checks, early awareness, and small corrections.

Operational takeaway: Late correction creates workload; early awareness protects simplicity in VFR navigation.

]]>

item.title: 003 — Go-Around Decision Discipline: Landing Is Optional
item.description: Morning aviation program episode on go-around decision discipline, stabilised approach judgement, and why an early go-around is a professional safety decision rather than a failed landing.
item.content:encoded:
Topic: Go-Around Decision Discipline

Focus: Decide early, fly positively, and do not force the landing to happen.

Operational takeaway: If the approach is no longer becoming simpler and more stable, go around before the situation becomes expensive.

item.title: 002 — Stabilized Approach: Build the Gate Before Short Final
item.description: Second MVP test episode for feed update validation. Published on the same GitHub Pages feed to verify that Apple Podcasts detects a new episode item in the existing show.
item.content:encoded:
Topic: Stabilized Approach

Purpose: Feed update validation on the same show

Note: This is the second MVP test item on the same GitHub Pages podcast feed.

item.title: 001 — EFATO: The First Seconds That Matter
item.description: NotebookLM-generated pilot/instructor morning audio draft focused on EFATO (Engine Failure After Take-Off), adapted as the first private episode prototype.
item.content:encoded:
Topic: EFATO — Engine Failure After Take-Off

Format: Morning aviation program prototype

Language: Chinese-led with English aviation terminology
